## AbstractCompoundDefType.innerConcepts property

Inner concept references contained within this compound.

**Signature:**

```typescript
innerConcepts?: InnerConceptDataModel[] | undefined;
```

## Remarks

Contains references to concepts that are defined within this compound. This property captures nested concept relationships extracted from 'innerconcept' XML elements, supporting hierarchical concept documentation.
